dtsPropsFor.Button: /** Visual style; default neutral, brand = high-contrast CTA. */ variant?: "default" | "brand" | "outline" | "secondary" | "ghost" | "destructive" | "link"; size?: "default" | "xs" | "sm" | "lg" | "icon" | "icon-xs" | "icon-sm" | "icon-lg"; className?: string; disabled?: boolean; type?: "button" | "submit" | "reset"; onClick?: (event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => void; children?: React.ReactNode
dtsPropsFor.SeverityBadge: /** Pill colour tone; maps risk bands low->success, medium->warning, high->danger. */ tone: "info" | "success" | "warning" | "danger" | "neutral"; label: string; /** Optional leading icon (e.g. a lucide-react icon component). */ icon?: React.ComponentType<{ size?: number }>; size?: "sm" | "md"; className?: string
dtsPropsFor.AppHeader: /** Full cockpit view model from buildView() in @/lib/cockpit-view; AppHeader reads the role identity and Compliance inbox fields. */ view: { isLogin: boolean; isApp: boolean; role: "rm" | "am" | "compliance" | null; isRM: boolean; isAM: boolean; isCompliance: boolean; roleName: string; roleTitle: string; roleAvatar: string; roleAvBg: string; roleAvColor: string; roleLine: string; roleLineBg: string; roleLineColor: string; nav: Array<{ label: string; count: number; hasCount: boolean; active: boolean; weight: string; bg: string; border: string; color: string; countBg: string; countColor: string }>; list: Array<{ id: string; client: string; sector: string; domicile: string; bandLabel: "LOW" | "MEDIUM" | "HIGH"; accent: string; dotColor: string; pillText: string; pillBg: string; pillBorder: string; pillColor: string; materiality: number; unread: boolean; selected: boolean }>; listKicker: string; listTitle: string; listSubtitle: string; listEmpty: boolean; listEmptyText: string; inboxCount: number; hasInboxUnread: boolean; hasDetail: boolean; noDetail: boolean; detail: unknown | null; msgRecipients: Array<{ key: "rm" | "am" | "compliance"; label: string; avatar: string; avBg: string; avColor: string; active: boolean; bg: string; color: string; border: string }>; msgPlaceholder: string }; /** Return to the seat picker. */ onLogout: () => void
dtsPropsFor.Sidebar: /** Role-specific navigation items from buildView().nav. */ nav: Array<{ label: string; count: number; hasCount: boolean; active: boolean; weight: string; bg: string; border: string; color: string; countBg: string; countColor: string }>
dtsPropsFor.CaseList: /** Full cockpit view model from buildView(); CaseList reads list* and the ranked rows. */ view: { isLogin: boolean; isApp: boolean; role: "rm" | "am" | "compliance" | null; isRM: boolean; isAM: boolean; isCompliance: boolean; roleName: string; roleTitle: string; roleAvatar: string; roleAvBg: string; roleAvColor: string; roleLine: string; roleLineBg: string; roleLineColor: string; nav: Array<{ label: string; count: number; hasCount: boolean; active: boolean; weight: string; bg: string; border: string; color: string; countBg: string; countColor: string }>; list: Array<{ id: string; client: string; sector: string; domicile: string; bandLabel: "LOW" | "MEDIUM" | "HIGH"; accent: string; dotColor: string; pillText: string; pillBg: string; pillBorder: string; pillColor: string; materiality: number; unread: boolean; selected: boolean }>; listKicker: string; listTitle: string; listSubtitle: string; listEmpty: boolean; listEmptyText: string; inboxCount: number; hasInboxUnread: boolean; hasDetail: boolean; noDetail: boolean; detail: unknown | null; msgRecipients: Array<{ key: "rm" | "am" | "compliance"; label: string; avatar: string; avBg: string; avColor: string; active: boolean; bg: string; color: string; border: string }>; msgPlaceholder: string }; /** Select a case by id. */ onSelect: (id: string) => void
dtsPropsFor.CaseDetail: /** Detail view model for the selected case from buildView().detail. */ detail: { client: string; lei: string; sector: string; domicile: string; headline: string; band: "LOW" | "MEDIUM" | "HIGH"; prevBand: "LOW" | "MEDIUM" | "HIGH"; showDelta: boolean; bandBg: string; bandBorder: string; bandColor: string; statusText: string; statusBg: string; statusBorder: string; statusColor: string; ownerLabel: string; materiality: number; matPct: string; signals: Array<{ label: string; pts: number; pct: string; barColor: string; textColor: string }>; changes: Array<{ text: string; src: string; dot: string; textColor: string }>; facts: string[]; rec: { has: boolean; label?: string; rationale?: string; direction?: string; bg?: string; border?: string; tagBg?: string; tagColor?: string }; hasActorButtons: boolean; actionHeading: string; actorButtons: Array<{ key: string; label: string; sub: string; bg: string; color: string; border: string; subColor: string }>; instructionPending: boolean; instructionLabel: string; instructionDetail: string; instructionCta: string; instructionDone: boolean; instructionDoneText: string; decidedBanner: boolean; outcomeLabel: string; outcomeTail: string; outcomeBg: string; outcomeBorder: string; outcomeColor: string; thread: Array<{ avatar: string; avBg: string; avColor: string; who: string; toLabel: string; ts: string; text: string; align: "flex-start" | "flex-end"; bubbleBg: string; bubbleBorder: string }>; threadEmpty: boolean; peerHint: string; audit: Array<{ ts: string; actor: string; action: string }>; auditEmpty: boolean }; /** Message recipients from buildView().msgRecipients. */ recipients: Array<{ key: "rm" | "am" | "compliance"; label: string; avatar: string; avBg: string; avColor: string; active: boolean; bg: string; color: string; border: string }>; msgDraft: string; msgPlaceholder: string; /** Dispatch a decision/action button by its key. */ onAction: (key: string) => void; onConfirmInstruction: () => void; onPickRecipient: (role: "rm" | "am" | "compliance") => void; onMsgChange: (value: string) => void; onSend: () => void
dtsPropsFor.LoginScreen: /** Pick a seat to enter the cockpit as that role. */ onPick: (role: "rm" | "am" | "compliance") => void
